purpose: 乔木正式 HTML deck 的机器可读设计内核策略。正式路线以 HTML 原生语义为主，SVG 只做局部组件或兼容 fallback；它抽象外部 web-deck 项目的优点，但不复制模板、CSS、类名、页面设计、长提示词或运行时依赖。

stage_model.preferred_scaler: native DOM stage: scale = min(viewportW / 1920, viewportH / 1080); left/top offsets from scaled size; transform-origin top left
stage_model.fallback_scaler: CSS aspect-ratio inner stage with stable tokenized geometry

style_discovery.preview_rule: style candidates must look like real first slides, not mood boards
style_discovery.approval_gate: lock selected candidate into html_design_kernel.json before full generation

token_contract.rule: tokens must explain domain fit and avoid-style choices

layout_registry_policy.ids: Qiaomu Lxx / ITLxx / component_type ids only
layout_registry_policy.no_copy_rule: do not copy upstream layout ids or template class systems
layout_registry_policy.html_only_rule: For semantic_html_deck projects with only HTML requested, use html_layout_intent as the primary layout contract; spec_lock layout_execution_contract is optional audit evidence, not a mandatory absolute-coordinate execution JSON.

html_layout_intent_policy.purpose: Keep HTML decks semantic and flexible while preserving reviewable structure.
html_layout_intent_policy.renderer_freedom: DOM/CSS grid/flex and fixed-stage tokens are allowed; absolute x/y/w/h slots are only required for PPTX parity, precise diagrams, charts, maps, or authored motion paths.
html_layout_intent_policy.decorative_asset_rule: Do not generate arcs, boxes, seals, grids, rails, or image slots solely to satisfy PPTX-oriented contracts. Every visible motif needs a topic or reading-path reason.

image_slot_policy.rule: every content image must be bound to a slide claim and review target

motion_policy.rule: motion reveals reading path or evidence; decorative motion is rejected
motion_policy.fallback: respect prefers-reduced-motion and keep a readable static state

qa_gates.browser_review: capture representative screenshots and record them in html_delivery_manifest.json
